---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new language, tooling, or workflow feature for Valea.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
Describe the feature and the desired end state.

## Motivation
Explain why this feature is valuable for users or maintainers.

## Files affected
List files or areas likely to be changed.

- `path/to/file`

## Acceptance criteria
Define clear, testable conditions for completion.

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Example code (optional)
Provide sample Valea code, CLI usage, or pseudo-code if helpful.

```vale
// Optional example
```
